text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Oguri Cap has asked me to visit a shrine with her.
choice_data_list: Why did you want to come to a shrine?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I've been feeling kind of sluggish lately.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I keep making small mistakes in everything I do. I
just don't feel like myself...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Masa always used to say, "In troubling times, ask
the divine."

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
And sure enough, praying at the shrine at my
hometown's racecourse seemed to work. It even
helped me win a race or two.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: That's why I've decided to ask the gods for help.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: You will? Thanks. I really appreciate it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Oguri Cap and I pray together.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I left an offering as well, so I hope our prayers are
answered...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
No way! It's a coupon for a free extra serving of
ramen! The gods sure are quick to listen!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I think they're telling me to stuff my face with
ramen for a boost of energy!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I feel better already. All right, let's go get some
ramen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Armed with the answer to her prayers, Oguri Cap
happily skips down the road as we head off to
enjoy some ramen.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I can't believe I let such a great coupon go to waste... Sigh.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This doesn't seem like a good sign of things to
come...
